data.content: Thank you to Boris Johnson! "This was a machine-gun mob-style hit job on Trump. It was nakedly political - and will make his victory more likely, not less.” “It was nakedly political. It was completely artificial. The Democrat prosecutors thought they were being so clever: tripping Trump up over this technicality – like collaring Al Capone for tax evasion, they probably told themselves.
